title: astragalus gilensis
intro: Astragalus gilensis, also known as Huangqi or Milk Vetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family, native to the mountainous regions of China and the western United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus gilensis include improved immune function, enhanced cardiovascular health, and reduced stress and fatigue, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus gilensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as capsules, teas, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
